My Value Proposition

What I Bring

Three core strengths that make me an effective Business Analyst.

📈
Data Storytelling

I transform raw datasets into compelling visual narratives using Power BI, Plotly, and Streamlit — making complex insights accessible to any stakeholder.

💼
Business Thinking

I connect technical outputs to business outcomes — translating model results and dashboard metrics into clear, actionable recommendations for decision-makers.

⚡
Technical Execution

From data wrangling to model deployment, I deliver end-to-end solutions using Python, SQL, Flask, and Agile frameworks — on time and production-ready.

Career Journey

Work Experience

Hands-on industry exposure building real-world ML systems and data pipelines.

Internship Trainee
Tech Mahindra
Feb 2025 – May 2025 4 months
  • Built an ML-based heart disease prediction model evaluating Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and SVM classifiers to maximize predictive accuracy.
  • Performed end-to-end data preprocessing including missing value treatment, feature scaling, and EDA on clinical patient data using Pandas and NumPy.
  • Deployed a Flask web application integrating the trained ML model for real-time heart disease risk prediction.
  • Designed an interactive HTML/CSS frontend to collect key clinical features and display model predictions dynamically.
Machine learning Intern
Cognifyz Technologies
Dec 2024 – Jan 2025 2 months
  • Conducted deep-dive EDA on a 10,000+ row restaurant dataset using Python, Pandas, and Plotly to uncover customer behavior, cuisine trends, and pricing patterns.
  • Built interactive Power BI dashboards tracking restaurant performance KPIs — ratings, revenue, cuisine distribution — enabling data-driven menu and pricing decisions.
  • Developed a content-based restaurant recommendation system using cosine similarity on cuisine and location features.
  • Performed geospatial analysis on restaurant location data to identify high-performing city clusters and expansion opportunities.

Beyond Academics

Leadership & Impact

Proven ability to lead large teams, manage events, and drive growth at national scale.

Chief Advisor
PRAGYAA 2025 — National Cultural Fest, SGGSIE&T

Serving as the strategic backbone of IIT ISM Dhanbad's flagship national cultural festival — one of the most anticipated collegiate events in eastern India. Providing high-level advisory to the core organising committee on event architecture, timeline planning, and resource allocation.

  • Mentoring a 60+ member student committee across departments including PR, logistics, sponsorship, and creatives
  • Driving corporate outreach and sponsorship negotiations to secure funding from national-level brands
  • Overseeing risk management, contingency planning, and cross-team coordination for seamless execution
  • Providing strategic direction on digital marketing campaigns and social media visibility for the festival
Joint Coordinator
PRAGYAA 2023 — National Cultural Fest, SGGSIE&T

Co-led the end-to-end planning and execution of PRAGYAA 2023, a 3-day national cultural festival that attracted participants from premier institutions across India. Managed a 40+ member core team and coordinated with hundreds of volunteers on the ground.

  • Coordinated artist bookings, stage management, and live event operations across multiple simultaneous venues
  • Managed budgeting, vendor negotiations, and procurement for all event verticals
  • Led participant registration, grievance handling, and inter-college coordination for 20+ competing teams
  • Achieved record footfall and highest-ever participant satisfaction ratings in PRAGYAA's history
